markdown:
#  Which fields in the Commitments tool can be configured as required, optional, or hidden? 
##  Background 
Certain fields in the Commitments tool can be configured as required, optional, or hidden. For example, if you want to make certain fields required, or hide a field that is not relevant to you and your team, you can configure these preferences in the Company level Admin tool and then apply them to one or more projects. Not all fields are configurable. Fields not available for configuration are in gray italics with the default setting marked in the table. See [Create New Configurable Fieldsets](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/create-new-configurable-fieldsets).
##  Answer 
The tables below detail which fields can be configured for sections in the project's Commitments tool:
  * Purchase Orders
  * Subcontracts


_Note:_
  * A GREEN checkmark ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12) indicates the possible settings for the field.
  * A RED 'x' ![Icon Permissions No Access X](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cdaab801833cf04cee09180aa0f2fef6/a31acd56ba44c1549cf2605afba18b8d/red-x.png?fm=webp&h=12) indicates the field cannot be configured to this setting.
  * A field name in GRAY italics indicates the field cannot be configured from its default setting.

#####  Note
